details.test: Task 1: Join watch party for next Red City FC home match in May 2025
Task 2: Join most active fan group for Red City FC and enable all-new-posts notifications
Task 3: Create match discussion thread with tags, poll, and subscription
Task 4: Like referee-related comments in Red City vs Blue United post-match thread
Task 5: Set Red City FC as favorite with only goal alerts and disable other teams alerts
Task 6: Add Red City FC jersey (and other items if available) to cart with constraints
Task 7: Submit score predictions with 2 home goals for up to three upcoming matches
Task 8: Compare Alex Torres vs Marco Silva and favorite better young goal-scorer
Task 9: Build personal schedule with Red City FC league matches and derby
